channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Suspected WWII bomb detonates in Indonesia, killing 5 people
item.description: A suspected World War II-era shell exploded beneath a house, killing five and wounding nearly 20, police reported Monday.

item.title: Trump says Iran 'really wants' a deal and predicts 'it will all work out well'
item.description: Trump tells critics to 'sit back and relax' after another round of airstrikes tests the fragile U.S.-Iran ceasefire.

item.title: WATCH: America Strong — When most slow down, he's just getting started!
item.description: 90-year-old Bill Schwarz runs his first marathon in San Diego.

item.title: Trump plan would allow quick asylum rejections, documents show
item.description: The regulation, described in internal documents obtained by CBS News, represents the latest White House effort to tighten asylum access.
